candidate_problem_record.subject: math
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Since $\triangle OCA \cong \triangle OBD$, $\angle A=30^\circ$, $\angle AOC=80^\circ$,
$\therefore \angle B=\angle C=180^\circ-\angle A-\angle AOC=180^\circ-30^\circ-80^\circ=\boxed{70^\circ}$.
